'''Neufie''' was the nickname given by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] for [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[R9-series astromech droid]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was used in his [[StealthX]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] during the height of the [[Swarm War]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Neuf'' is [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] for [[nine]]. A French-like language exists in a galaxy far, far away: According to Dave Filoni, George Lucas specifically requested [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] featured in [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']] all speak with French accents.<ref name="Liberty on Ryloth Commentary">{{SW|url=video/liberty-on-ryloth-episode-featurette|text="Liberty on Ryloth" Episode Featurette}}</ref>
